name: addit
description: Self-hosted marketplace for addit-harness — a full digital product development kit for Claude Code.

plugins.name: addit-harness
plugins.description: Turns Claude Code into a full product-development toolkit: an opinionated plan → verify → commit engineering workflow, specialized subagents for legal compliance, UX design, architecture, and Go/Java/TypeScript implementation, and a code reviewer that enforces your language conventions automatically. Curated and adapted from established open-source sources, not hand-rolled from scratch.
